also document in the record that it accessed the Medicare contractor’s inquiry system to 
determine whether or not the patient was under an established home health plan of care 
and it must contact the initial HHA on the effective date of transfer. In the rare 
circumstance of a dispute between HHAs, the Medicare contractor is responsible for
